name: Whole Wheat Carrot Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Ensure all ingredients are at room temperature.
2. Place the ingredients in the order specified by your machine's manual.
3. As the moisture content of vegetables varies, monitor the amount of liquid used.
4. Do not add any extra liquid until the machine has kneaded enough to extract liquid from the vegetables.
5. Initially, the dough may appear dry or crumbly, but it will become easier to form a soft, round, slightly tacky ball as kneading progresses.
6. If, after the end of kneading, the dough has not formed a soft, round, slightly tacky ball, add liquid one tablespoon at a time until desired consistency is achieved.
